description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Crowdin Translation Integration that runs on a scheduled basis, specifically every Friday at 8:30 AM UTC. The workflow should use an ubuntu-latest job to set up Java 18 and Python 3.10, checkout the repository, download translations from Crowdin using a provided API key, create a libretro_core_options_intl.h file, commit the changes, and push them back to the repository.
